## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.32

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Removes the direct-stream HTTP keepalive call from the WebRTC camera startup path so live-view signaling follows the Android app WebRTC flow more closely.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Keeps the compact camera signaling context focused on ticket, offer, ICE, peer, and timeout state without logging noisy keepalive failures from the wrong playback path.
